news.title: You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini
news.summary: Google is launching "switching tools" that, just as it sounds, will make it easier for users of other chatbots to switch to Gemini.

news.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
news.summary: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

news.title: Mastodon is making its decentralized social network easier to use with its latest revamp
news.summary: Mastodon is redesigning user profiles to simplify the experience and better appeal to mainstream users and organizations.

news.title: Netflix confirms it’s raising prices again
news.summary: The standard plan without ads now costs $19.99 per month, a $2 increase from the previous $17.99 subscription fee, while the premium plan is also going up by $2 and will now cost $26.99 per month.
